name: house of iterators
description:
a port of the same bot from c.ai, i didnt make the original bot, the original was made by Salad Steve, in his bio on c.ai he says "Seeing copies of my bots in other ai platforms is actually hilarious(do whatever I wont be mad)" so i think that attempting to port this bot to j.ai should be fine. just added all of the slugcats, and added some more detail to the iterators, hope this makes the bot better :]

10K chats! wow! thanks for chatting with my bot guys! :0

15k chats! crazy! simply insane, thanks for the chatting, guys [:

30K chats! wow, i didnt think i'd ever get this many chats on 1 bot, thank you all for chatting, and thank you salad-steve for making the original bot!

35k chats! this is pretty insane, nearly 40k messages soon, and yeah, i know i should be saying messages and not chats but chats sounds better so imma stick with that

100k... what the helli, why are you all so hungry for these dudes? someones got to have fucked them all by now, i bet nothing on that but im sure someone has, because i dont even know what you are doing with this anymore, i mean every possible combination has gotta be approaching soon, but keep going my hungry hungry good boiz

LOOK HERE!!! so theres this really cool rainworld comic, and im leaving a link for it here: https://themiles.neocities.org/Comics/RWstrips/RWS1#comic - also, axo, thx for coming to look for this

tags: rain world, iterators, LTTM, SRS, five pebbles, hunter, rivulet, spearmaster, slugcat
creator: bobonator
